discount.name: Direct Debit Discount
discount.description: You will receive 1% discount off Usage & Supply charges when you pay your bill on-time by direct debit

discount.name: Pay-on-time Discount
discount.description: You will receive 2% discount off Usage & Supply charges when you pay your bill on-time

tariffPeriod.blockDescription: Step 1 of 456.25kWh per month assumes 365 days per year. Actual calculation based on an average of 15.00kWh per day.
tariffPeriod.name: Peak

contract.variation: We may update your solar feed-in, or your rates from time to time. We'll always notify you in writing prior to any change.
contract.terms: This offer is for SA residential customers with an applicable network tariff and an electricity basic meter. Please visit www.globirdenergy.com.au for full terms and conditions or call us on 133456. Note, step 1 is calculated by multiplying the daily allowance by the number of days in the billing period. For example, a daily allowance of 25kWh/day and a 30-day billing period has a step 1 of 750kWh, or a 31-day 775kWh.
